section_name: Period of validity of escort certificates
text:
An escort certificate shall be valid:

(a) for a New York state licensee from its date of issuance until the expiration of such person’s driver’s license, and

(b) for non-residents, a four year period from its date of issuance.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 5
#### Article 21
##### § 547 — Period of validity of escort certificates

An escort certificate shall be valid:

(a) for a New York state licensee from its date of issuance until the expiration of such person’s driver’s license, and

(b) for non-residents, a four year period from its date of issuance.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: An escort certificate shall be valid:

subsections.label: b
